source: Android, iOS, and shared available data type mapping characterization under shared ownership
description: Pins available online/offline/HR-service data type behavior families that must remain covered before broader feature availability or PMD facade behavior moves into shared code.

expected.commonDecision: Available-data-types shared ownership remains valid while this readiness manifest is executable from shared commonTest, Android and iOS data utility tests continue to pin offline and online PMD-to-public mapping, HR-service availability projection, iOS location/pressure filters, Android full public surface, public-to-PMD measurement lookup, unknown public type boundaries, PMD feature-read boundaries, HR-service discovery boundaries, public error mapping boundaries, platform vector references, and compile verification before broader availability facade behavior moves.

commonRuntimePrototype.status: executable shared commonTest available-data-types planning guard
commonRuntimePrototype.reason: Declared because this vector is consumed by shared commonTest and platform adapter tests before available-data-types runtime delegation moves further into shared.

notes: This readiness manifest gates platform-neutral data type name planning only. PMD feature reads, HR service discovery, platform public enum projection, BLE transport execution, SwiftPM/watchOS fallback, and availability-query public error mapping remain platform-owned until a later runtime slice deliberately transfers execution to shared code.
